Critlcal Wound Wound Value: Critical Wounds are very dangerous and life-threatening but will not kill character as quickly as Deadly Wounds fact; very strong (or strong-willed} characters can even continue to fight (or, if they are smart; rush to hospital) while suffering Critical Wound Examples include severed limbs, serious dam age t0 major organs and arterial bleeding: Atter taking Critical Wound character is stunned and must make an immediate Knockout Check (see 116). Also apply +3 Modifier to all the character's TNs for each Critical Wound suffered and divide all movement rates in half (round down): Critically Wounded character does not receive success ful treatment with the First Aid Skill within minute of receiving the wound, the wound value of the Critical Wound increases by This bleeding continues every minute until the character receives treatment or falls unconscious from total wound value_ in which case the bleeding effect rules then apply (P. 1161.
WOUND TypE8 The wound types listed on the Wound Table have the fol: owing effects
Fatlgue Only Included here for the sake of completeness_ Fatigue Only result not actually wound_ In this case  the character only scraped_ bruised or winded by the attack and suffers no last- ing effects_ All the attack does inflict Fatigue point on the target.
Grazlng Wound Wound Value: This the classic "it' $ only flesh wound result. Attacks that barely hit barely get through the target' armor will inflict this kind of wound Examples include minor flesh wound_ bleeding cut, deep and paintul bruise and 50 on The only immediate effect of Grazing Wound is that the character is stunned (see 1161. number 0f Grazing Wounds can add up to serious problem through bleeding and shock; represented the wound value .
Deadly Wound Wound Value: 16 Deadly Wound is so serious that only immediate ad advanced surgical care will have any chance of saving the char- acter'$ life_ Examples include catastrophic brain heart dam age_ the destruction multiple other major organs such as the lungs or liver and/or the severing of multiple limbs at the trunk; The only' combat effect of Deadly Wound is that the character immediately falls unconscious The gamemaster should then  secretly roll 106 and add the character" BOD Attribute to the result. This total is the number of minutes the character has t0 be hooked up t0 Iife support and placed doctor' care before he dies see Emergency Care, 1231.
Minor Wound Wound Value: Minor Wound is real- injury that causes significant pain ad requires medical treatment to heal properly: Examples include cracked bones_ deep cuts into muscle or slow bleeding wounds: For each Minor Wound suffered, the character applies Modifier to all TNs and stunned_
Serlous Wound Wound Value: Serious Wounds are real trouble Player  characters are usually tough enough take one two of these and keep on fighting: but Serious Wounds still need prompt  first-aid treat ment or the character could suffer permanent disability or even Examples include compound fractures ana damage minor organs_ After taking Serious Wound_ character stunned and must make immediate Knockout Check (see 116). Also apply +2 Modifier to all the character'$ TNs for each Serious Wound suffered Seriously Wounded character does not receive cessful treatment,with the First Aid Skill within minutes receiving the wound the wound value of the Serious Wound increases by This bleeding" continues every 5 minutes until the character receives treatment Or falls unconscious from total wound value in which case the bleeding effect rules then apply see 116}.
Fatal Wound Wound Value: 32 truly devastating attack can result in damage s0 total that death immediate and certain; This level of destruction rare from personal weapons_ but it can come up more often if the altacker firin support weapon Or vehicular weapon; char- acter that sulfers Fatal Wound is most definitely dead, and there Isn" much left tO put in the coffin, either:
